title: Jira integration
excerpt:
Hey all, 
Anyone tried to add an integration with Jira Discovery?  it’s quite a new product so unsure if it’s possible. 
Love to hear anyone’s findings, thoughts, feedback. 
Thank you! :blush:

posts.author: christinap (Christina Punchard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can recommend talking to the lovely people at Appfire and Adaptavist as they are both platinum partners for monday.com and Atlassian.

Likely @hollywright will know someone for you to talk to.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: christinap (Christina Punchard)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Thanks for reaching out. I’m able to integrate Monday.com and Jira but I’m unable to link the Jira Discovery items.
